allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix CORS issue: Add withCredentials to axios config

The axios instance was missing withCredentials: true, which is required
when the backend has allow_credentials=True in CORS configuration.
Without this, browsers block requests even when the server sends correct
CORS headers.

This fixes the "No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header" error when
attempting Google OAuth login on production domain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix database schema: Run migrations on startup

The production database was missing invitation_token and 
invitation_expires_at columns, causing a 500 error on Google OAuth login.

Updated Dockerfile to run migration scripts automatically on startup,
which will add the missing columns to the users table.

This fixes: sqlalchemy.exc.OperationalError: no such column: users.invitation_token

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
